description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly white with dark trim, and it incorporates large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The front facade is accented by a row of tall, slender trees and a mix of lush greenery, providing a natural contrast to the geometric structure. There are multiple balconies and terraces, some with glass or metal railings, and a main entryway that is recessed and partially obscured by landscaping. The building appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back in places to create outdoor spaces. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, light-filled interiors and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping featuring tall trees and lush plants. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and geometric elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing a white facade with a balcony, large windows, and a section of tan fencing; some greenery is visible on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting multiple large windows in symmetrical rows, a central terrace with plants, and a clear view of the building's boxy structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a single window, visible greenery including a palm tree, and a plain white wall with minimal features.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway, a row of tall, slender trees, a palm tree, and a mix of horizontal and vertical window arrangements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and some symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entryway with minimalistic design, partially obscured by landscaping and flanked by tall trees, no visible porch or decorative columns
